Learn 'Practically' by Building
Real Businesses

Dropshipping Challenge

Start Your Journey by Building a Profitable E-commerce Business

Build an e-commerce store, master sourcing, sales and digital marketing, and generate 1Cr+ in revenue in just 4 months.

Download Dropshipping Report
Venture Initiation Program

Learn by Building a Real Startup, with Real Customers & Revenue

Participate in Masters’ Union proprietary venture building sprint — from ideation to launch, designed to build high-potential startups and test product-market-fit.

Download VIP Challenge Report
Demo Day

Pitch to 100+ VCs & Get Term
Sheets, Even Before You Graduate

Pitch your startup to our internal partner network with investors from Elevation Capital, Accel, InfoEdge Ventures, Peak XV and more.

Download Demo Day Report

Hands-on Learning:
Consult, Invest, Experience

Solve Real Problems &
Learn from Leadership

Consult Cars24 & 100+ companies, solve real problems, pitch to leadership and have a shot at placements.

1

15% of student consultants land PPOs

2

Over 300+ clients annually

3

1 in 6 live projects with international firms

Invest from a
₹5Cr Student Fund

Run a ₹5cr investment fund and invest across equities, startups, crypto, real estate, and commodities.

1

10+ investments made every year

2

Trade on stocks, crypto & even real estate

3

65%+ returns generated in 2024–25

Visit India's
Biggest Factories

Meet 50+ operators, visit India's biggest factories, and gain insights from the likes of Physics Wallah and Cars24.

1

50+ industrial visits every year

2

30% engagements convert to consulting projects

3

Land internships while meeting CEOs

Thought Leadership from
Our Faculty

At Masters’ Union, our faculty are not just teachers —
they are industry leaders driving real-world change.

Dr. Nandini Seth - Professor, Masters’ Union, on
TRS with Ranveer Allahbadia

500+ Masters

Built by Scholars, Led by Industry Practitioners

At Masters' Union, your classroom is powered by Ivy League academics and global business leaders — from Harvard to McKinsey, from Wharton to Google. Our Masters don't just teach the playbook. They wrote it.

Thrive with Real-Time
Access to 500+ Mentors

1

Our mentorship platform, provides access to 500+ mentors for instant support

2

Prep for interviews, get feedback on your startup or find emotional support

3

Mentors are available, in most cases, within an hour for calls or meet-ups

Building Real Startups,
Not Just Projects

A data-backed report on student startups, covering valuation, revenue, funding, and market traction.

Download Entrepreneurship Report

Shark Tank x Masters’ Union

Shark Tank India exclusively partners with Masters’ Union to spotlight top college and school startups in its Campus Special Episode.

The Campus Episode has now brought together student founders from across the country, showcasing their ideas on a national platform.

Our Students on Shark Tank

Real Entrepreneurs, Real Pitches, Masters’ Union students on India's Biggest Startup Stage,
Shark Tank India.
